dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4881 IS: Unlocking Low-Income Taxpayer Clinic Funding Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Welch (for himself and Mr. Marshall) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to modify the matching funds requirement for grants provided to low-income taxpayer clinics.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Unlocking Low-Income Taxpayer Clinic Funding Act.

subsection.text: Paragraph (5) of section 7526(c) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended to read as follows:

subparagraph.text: With respect to any grant provided to a low-income taxpayer clinic under this section, such clinic shall provide matching funds equal to the applicable percentage of the amount of such grant.

clause.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term matching funds may include—

subclause.text: the salary (including fringe benefits) of individuals performing services for the low-income taxpayer clinic, and
the cost of equipment used in the low-income taxpayer clinic.

clause.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term matching funds shall not include any indirect expenses, such as general overhead of the institution sponsoring the low-income taxpayer clinic.

subparagraph.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), the applicable percentage shall be 100 percent, except that the Secretary may establish a lower percentage (not below 25 percent) if the Secretary determines that such percentage would expand the coverage of the low-income taxpayer clinic to additional taxpayers.

subsection.text: Section 7526(c) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, as amended by subsection (a), is further amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating paragraphs (3) through (6) as paragraphs (1) through (4).

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to calendar years beginning after the date of enactment of this Act.
